colonist_actions.action: Cosmo-29 proposes research_directive: study the anomaly

sub_sims.s_expr:

          (begin
            (define morale-factor (/ colony-morale 100))
            (define pop-factor (/ colony-population 10))
            (list morale-factor pop-factor)))

diary_entries.entry: Population: 26. Habitat pressure breach detected. I spent the year on coding. Closest to Ares.
Year 96 on Mars. Habitat pressure breach detected. Morale is hopeful. We have 123 food units left.
The hab_breach changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.

meta_awareness: Titan (year 96): 'If I can spawn a sub-simulation to test governance, who spawned the simulation I live in to test THEIR governance?'
